bird.name: Somali thrush
bird.summary: The Somali thrush (Turdus ludoviciae), also known as the Somali blackbird, is a songbird species in the family Turdidae. It is endemic to S…

relations.subject: Somali thrush
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss and was formerly classified as Critically Endangered by the IUCN. Recent research has found that the loss of habitat is not as severe as first feared and the species is downlisted to Least Concern in 2021. Local conservation efforts have apparently aided in the protection of forests
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
